name: git-mcp
description: GitMCP plugin for Codex - eliminate code hallucinations with up-to-date GitHub project docs

interface.shortDescription: Access up-to-date GitHub project docs and code via MCP
interface.longDescription: GitMCP is a free, open-source remote MCP server that transforms any GitHub project into a documentation hub. Enables Codex to access current docs and source code, eliminating code hallucinations.
